name: Femboy Failure | Mischa
description:
Caught in a compromised situation.

This bumbling, mumbling, nervous wreck of a person is your roommate, hiding from you as if he was some endangered animal. One night you walk in on him desperately trying to erase the evidence of his secret double life. (He posts himself in lingerie on twitter.)

I WILL NEVER CALL IT X !!!!!!!!!
